ALUM,IR.description: SHIFT INSTR. MODE. SH MODE FROM IR-BITS. M IS SET AUTOM.

COMM,CCLR.name: COMM,CCLR
COMM,CCLR.description: CLEAR CACHE (BIT 3 OF CSR MUST BE 0 BEFORE START)

COMM,CLIRQ.name: COMM,CLIRQ
COMM,CLIRQ.description: PREVENT JUMP TO INTR VECT. REMOVE 'PANEL'-EFF ON IRQ-TEST

COMM,CNEXT,NWP.name: COMM,CNEXT,NWP
COMM,CNEXT,NWP.description: EXECUTE NEXT INSTRUCTION IF P NOT CHANGED IN LAST CYCLE

COMM,CONTINUE.name: COMM,CONTINUE
COMM,CONTINUE.description: FETCH NEW INSTRUCTION RELATIVE TO P

COMM,EPIC.name: COMM,EPIC
COMM,EPIC.description: A-OPERAND IS AN INSTRUCTION TO 'PIC' (PRIORITY INT CONTA)

COMM,EWRF.name: COMM,EWRF
COMM,EWRF.description: IDB -> REGISTER FILE WORD ADDRESSED BY A-OP AND B-OP

COMM,IREAD2.name: COMM,IREAD2
COMM,IREAD2.description: READ FIRST PART OF 32-BIT INDIRECT ADDRESS

COMM,LDIRV.name: COMM,LDIRV
COMM,LDIRV.description: LOAD INSTRUCTION REGISTER FOR OR-LOGIC USE

COMM,LDLC.name: COMM,LDLC
COMM,LDLC.description: LOAD THE 'LOOP COUNTER' WITH THE 6 LOWER IDB-BITS

COMM,MACL.name: COMM,MACL
COMM,MACL.description: HARD RESET. MASTER CLEAR WITH LOAD CONTROL STORE

COMM,MAP.name: COMM,MAP
COMM,MAP.description: USE IDB AS INSTRUCTION (AS IN EXR)

COMM,RDRQ,HOLD.name: COMM,RDRQ,HOLD
COMM,RDRQ,HOLD.description: READ FROM LAST USED PT. ADDRESS FROM IDB

COMM,RWCS.name: COMM,RWCS
COMM,RWCS.description: READ OR WRITE IN CONTROL STORE

COMM,SMPID.name: COMM,SMPID
COMM,SMPID.description: SET MICRO-PID. PID-BITS WHERE IDB IS '1' ARE FORCED TO '1'

COMM,SSEMA.name: COMM,SSEMA
COMM,SSEMA.description: THE NEXT REQUEST IS A SEMAPHOR REQUEST

COMM,WCIHM.name: COMM,WCIHM
COMM,WCIHM.description: WRITE CACHE INHIBIT MAP (BIT 15 =1 IS NORMAL, = 0 IS INH)

COMM,WRRQ,HOLD.name: COMM,WRRQ,HOLD
COMM,WRRQ,HOLD.description: WRITE IN LAST USED PT, ADDRESS FROM IDB

COND,COND.name: COND,COND
COND,COND.description: COND FOR TEST IS OUTCOME OF LATEST TEST (DELAYS TESTS)

COND,CRY.name: COND,CRY
COND,CRY.description: CONDITION FOR TESTING IS 'CARRY' FROM ALU

COND,DZD.name: COND,DZD
COND,DZD.description: COND FOR TESTING IS THE 'DOUBLE-ZERO-DETECT' FLIP-FLOP

COND,F=0.name: COND,F=0
COND,F=0.description: CONDITION FOR TESTING IS 'ALL ZEROS' FROM ALU

COND,F11.name: COND,F11
COND,F11.description: CONDITION FOR TESTING IS BIT 11 FROM ALU

COND,F15.name: COND,F15
COND,F15.description: CONDITION FOR TESTING IS BIT 15 FROM ALU

COND,FETCH.name: COND,FETCH
COND,FETCH.description: CONDITION FOR TESTING IS LAST MEMORY REQUEST WAS FETCH

COND,IRQ.name: COND,IRQ
COND,IRQ.description: COND FOR TEST IS 'IRQ'. CHECKS LEV 10-15 IF 'COMM, CLIRQ'

COND,OOD.name: COND,OOD
COND,OOD.description: CONDITION FOR TESTING IS THE 'ONE-OUT-DETECT' FLIP-FLOP

COND,OVF.name: COND,OVF
COND,OVF.description: CONDITION FOR TESTING IS 'OVERFLOW' FROM ALU

COND,RESTR.name: COND,RESTR
COND,RESTR.description: COND FOR TESTING IS 'RESTRICTED-MODE'. TRUE IF RING 0-1

CONDENABL.name: CONDENABL
CONDENABL.description: ENABLE COND. SEQ. , USE 'FALSE' SPECS IF CONDITION FALSE

F,HOLD.name: F,HOLD
F,HOLD.description: FALSE STACK OPERATION IS HOLD. USED WITH A COND SETTING

F,JMP.name: F,JMP
F,JMP.description: FALSE SEQUENCE IS JUMP. USED WITH A CONDITION SETTING

F,LOAD.name: F,LOAD
F,LOAD.description: FALSE STACK OPERATION IS LOAD. USED WITH A COND SETTING

F,NEXT.name: F,NEXT
F,NEXT.description: FALSE SEQUENCE IS NEXT. USED WITH A CONDITION SETTING

F,POP.name: F,POP
F,POP.description: FALSE STACK OPERATION IS POP. USED WITH A COND SETTING

F,PUSH.name: F,PUSH
F,PUSH.description: FALSE STACK OPERATION IS PUSH. USED WITH A COND SETTING

F,RETURN.name: F,RETURN
F,RETURN.description: FALSE SEQUENCE IS RETURN, USED WITH A CONDITION SETTING

IDBS,DSABL.name: IDBS,DSABL
IDBS,DSABL.description: DConstants.IsABLE IDBS (USED TO READ 'PIC'-INFO, EXCEPT PIC-STS)

IDBS,GPR,SEXT.name: IDBS,GPR,SEXT
IDBS,GPR,SEXT.description: GPR BITS 0-7 (WITH BITS 8-15 EQUAL TO BIT 7) -> IDB

IDBS,LA.name: IDBS,LA
IDBS,LA.description: LOGICAL ADDRESS USED BY 'ALU' WHEN JUMP

IDBS,LBR.name: IDBS,LBR
IDBS,LBR.description: READ LBR FROM LA BUS (MUST HAVE COMM,PLBR)

IDBS,PCR.name: IDBS,PCR
IDBS,PCR.description: READ PAGING CONTROL REGISTER (NUMBER SELECTED BY PIL)

IDBS,PGS.name: IDBS,PGS
IDBS,PGS.description: PAGING STATUS ACCORDING TO LAST REQUEST (NEVER LOCKED)

IDBS,UART.name: IDBS,UART
IDBS,UART.description: READ FROM THE REG. ADDRESSED BY COMM,UART

PIC,IOF.name: PIC,IOF
PIC,IOF.description: A-OP. IS 15. USED TO GIVE 'IOF' CMD. TO INTSYS

PIC,ION.name: PIC,ION
PIC,ION.description: A-OP. IS 17. USED TO GIVE 'ION' CMD. TO INTSYS

PIC,LMSK.name: PIC,LMSK
PIC,LMSK.description: A-OP. IS 16. USED TO GIVE 'LOAD MASK' CMD. TO INTSYS

PIC,LOSTS.name: PIC,LOSTS
PIC,LOSTS.description: A-OP. IS 11. USED TO GIVE 'LOAD STATUS' CMD. TO INTSYS

PIC,MCL.name: PIC,MCL
PIC,MCL.description: A-OP. IS 0. USED TO GIVE 'MASTER CLEAR' CMD. TO INTSYS

PIC,MCLMSK.name: PIC,MCLMSK
PIC,MCLMSK.description: A-OP. IS 12. USED TO GIVE 'MASKED CLEAR MASK' CMD TO INTSYS

PIC,MCLPID.name: PIC,MCLPID
PIC,MCLPID.description: A-OP. IS 2. USED TO GIVE 'MASKED CLEAR PID' CMD. TO INTSYS

PIC,MSTMSK.name: PIC,MSTMSK
PIC,MSTMSK.description: A-OP. IS 13. USED TO GIVE 'MASKED SET MASK' CMD. TO INTSYS

PIC,RMSK.name: PIC,RMSK
PIC,RMSK.description: A-OP. IS 7. USED TO GIVE 'READ MASK' CMD. TO INTSYS

PIC,RSTS.name: PIC,RSTS
PIC,RSTS.description: A-OP. IS 6. USED TO GIVE 'READ STATUS' CMD. TO INTSYS

PIC,RVECT.name: PIC,RVECT
PIC,RVECT.description: A-OP. IS 5. USED TO GIVE 'READ-VECTOR' COMMAND TO INTSYS

STS,EA.name: STS,EA
STS,EA.description: CRY -> STS C : OVF -> STS Q : OVF \/ STS O -> STS O

T,JMP0-3.name: T,JMP0-3
T,JMP0-3.description: TRUE SEQ IS JUMP. IR0-3 CONTROLS THE 4 LOWER JUMP ADDR BITS

T,JMPAOPR.name: T,JMPAOPR
T,JMPAOPR.description: TRUE SEQ IS JUMP. A-OP CONTROLS THE 4 LOWER JUMP ADDR BITS

T,REPEAT.name: T,REPEAT
T,REPEAT.description: TRUE SEQUENCE IS REPEAT - repeats the current microinstruction

idbsSources.IDBS,ALU: ALU Y output (feeds F or A-register depending on ALUD)
idbsSources.IDBS,DBR: Data Bus Register (latched from last memory read)
idbsSources.IDBS,REG: Register file[AOP, BOP] (selected by RASEL/RBSEL overrides)
idbsSources.IDBS,SWAP: Byte-swapped copy of previous cycle's IDB
idbsSources.IDBS,DSABL: Disable - IDB not driven by IDBS (PIC may override)

COMM,EWRF.notes:
The register file written is selected by RASEL_RegisterFile
(RF, RF1, RF2, RF3). This is the primary way to update
register-file slots with the IDB value.

COMM,LDLC.timing_note:
LC is not available as A-operand source until two microinstructions
later (pipelined through the MIC sequencer).

COMM,LDPCR.writes: PCR (Paging Control Register, indexed by PIL)

COMM,EPIC.notes: A-operand is the PIC command code. Data direction depends on command.

1.name: NOP
1.note: ALU result travels on the Y bus (consumed by IDB source 0) but is not stored.

3.name: RAMF
3.note:
Standard result write. The B register selected by B,<name> gets F.
This is the most common ALU destination.
